entry of the fugue subject in B minor, stepwise chromatic descent followed by leap, characteristic of the B minor chromatic character"},{"id":"Answer (tonal)","bar_start":4,"bar_end":6,"description":"Tonal answer in the alto/tenor voice in F# minor, at the fifth"},{"id":"Subject entry 3","bar_start":7,"bar_end":9,"description":"Subject re-entry in bass register in B minor, third exposition entry"},{"id":"Countersubject I","bar_start":4,"bar_end":8,"description":"First countersubject in flowing eighth-note motion accompanying the answer, maintained through the exposition"},{"id":"Countersubject II","bar_start":7,"bar_end":11,"description":"Second countersubject in sixteenth-note figuration, introducing faster surface motion"},{"id":"Episode I (sequence)","bar_start":11,"bar_end":14,"description":"Descending sequential episode derived from subject head-motif, modulating toward F# minor, featuring invertible counterpoint"},{"id":"Middle Entry Group I","bar_start":15,"bar_end":24,"description":"Series of entries in related keys (F# minor, D major), with stretto-like overlapping and inversion"},{"id":"Episode II (chromatic)","bar_start":25,"bar_end":30,"description":"Extended chromatic sequential episode with parallel tenths and thirds, passing through B minor toward G# minor"},{"id":"Middle Entry Group II","bar_start":31,"bar_end":42,"description":"Entries in G# minor and E minor, with increasing textural density and faster surface figuration"},{"id":"Episode III","bar_start":43,"bar_end":48,"description":"Sequential episode moving through B minor toward A major via circle-of-fifths sequence"},{"id":"Middle Entry Group III","bar_start":49,"bar_end":58,"description":"Entries in A major and C# minor regions; subject in augmentation hinted in bass"},{"id":"Final Stretto","bar_start":65,"bar_end":74,"description":"Climactic stretto entries in B minor with all four voices overlapping at close intervals, texture thickening"},{"id":"Five-voice Coda","bar_start":75,"bar_end":76,"description":"Texture expands to five voices for the final two bars, culminating in full B minor cadence on sustained chord"}]}
